product_overview: Manta Studio is a premium digital atelier delivering a high-end landing experience, an experimental creative coding lab, and a portfolio-driven showcase. The site emphasizes tactile visuals, parallax/scroll animations, and a dynamic contact flow for project inquiries.
core_goals: Drive high conversion for project inquiries through a premium contact experience
Deliver flawless performance and SEO-optimized pages across devices
Provide world-class, responsive UX on mobile and desktop with polished animations
Showcase experimental technical work via a dedicated Lab while maintaining brand cohesion

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: High-impact landing with Hero animations, parallax Brand Intro, scroll-driven sections, custom cursor, and polished transitions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View Hero animations -> Scroll through sections -> See parallax-driven Brand Intro -> Use custom cursor navigation -> Observe smooth Framer Motion/GSAP transitions
Navigate to / -> Page assets fail to load -> See broken or frozen animations -> Click browser refresh or Retry -> See error notification or fallback content

features.name: Portfolio Showcase
features.description: Bento Grid layout showcasing projects with hover previews and click-to-view detail interactions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through sections to Portfolio -> Hover over project cards to see previews -> Click project cards to view details -> See project detail overlay or project page
Navigate to / -> Scroll to Portfolio -> Hover over project cards but previews do not appear -> Click project card -> See no response or error placeholder -> See prompt to retry or contact support

features.name: Laboratory Experiments
features.description: Experimental creative coding lab for technical demos and interactive experiments (WebGL/Three.js powered).
user_flows: Navigate to /lab -> See Lab header and experiment list -> Click an experiment or interact with canvas -> Interact with creative experiments -> Observe live rendering and responsive controls
Navigate to /lab -> Lab WebGL or assets fail to initialize -> See fallback message explaining limitation -> Click 'Report issue' or follow guidance to open the experiment in a supported environment

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Premium dynamic contact form for project inquiries with inline validation and submission feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to Contact section -> Fill in contact details -> Submit form for inquiries -> See success confirmation and next steps

Navigate to / -> Scroll to Contact section -> Fill in contact details with invalid email or missing required fields -> See inline validation messages -> Correct inputs -> Resubmit form -> See success confirmation
Navigate to / -> Scroll to Contact section -> Fill in contact details -> Submit form for inquiries -> Submission fails due to network or server error -> See error notification with retry option

features.name: Wavy 404 Experience
features.description: Engaging 'Blank Canvas' 404 with animated wavy background and a clear path back to the homepage.
user_flows: Navigate to /404 -> View wavy animations -> Click "Volver al Inicio" button -> Redirect to / -> See homepage
Navigate to /404 -> Wavy animations do not render due to missing assets -> 'Volver al Inicio' button visible but click fails -> Use Navbar Home link to navigate to / -> See homepage as fallback

features.name: Landing Page Navigation
features.description: High-end landing page with parallax and scroll animations

features.name: Portfolio Showcase
features.description: Bento Grid layout showing agency projects
user_interactions: Hover over project cards to see previews
Click project cards to view details

features.name: Laboratory Experiments
features.description: Space for creative coding and technical experiments

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Premium dynamic contact form for project inquiries

known_limitations.issue: %VITE_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID% is not defined in some environments
known_limitations.impact: Analytics script may fail tracking without the environment variable.
